changes.oldValue: MISSION_GAME_COUNT = 1 in mission.ts:11 locks every mission to one puzzle. The full beat1/beat2 narrative flow and game permutation logic already supports 2-3 puzzles per mission. When data pipelines for multiple puzzle types are stable, raise this constant to 2 or 3 and verify the narrative beat transitions work correctly end-to-end.
changes.newValue: The multi-puzzle flow (briefing → game 1 → beat 1 → game 2 → beat 2 → complete) is fully coded. MISSION_GAME_COUNT = 1 is the only thing holding it back. When you're ready to turn it on, tell me the count (2 or 3) and I'll flip it and verify the beat transitions end-to-end. No decision needed until the science data pipelines are live and stable.

snapshot.title: Enable multi-puzzle missions (raise MISSION_GAME_COUNT)
snapshot.description: The multi-puzzle flow (briefing → game 1 → beat 1 → game 2 → beat 2 → complete) is fully coded. MISSION_GAME_COUNT = 1 is the only thing holding it back. When you're ready to turn it on, tell me the count (2 or 3) and I'll flip it and verify the beat transitions end-to-end. No decision needed until the science data pipelines are live and stable.
